selected_goal: Infer source companion keys from canonical paper IDs in output-integrity audits when source PDF metadata is absent.
why_this_now: Iteration 4 grouped missing mark-scheme records by paper/source companion, but the live report still showed source_companion=missing for all groups. The paper IDs contain enough canonical identity to infer syllabus/year/session/component companion keys, making the missing-mark-scheme groups actionable without editing output records.
repo_evidence: Iteration 4 live audit grouped 74 unexpected missing mark-scheme records, but every group had source_companion=missing.
src/exam_bank/audit.py currently derives source companion from mark_scheme_source_pdf/source_pdf and known missing companion paper matches only.
The live paper IDs use parseable forms such as 33winter11, 12winter16, 42summer19, and 63summer17.
acceptance_criteria: When source_pdf and mark_scheme_source_pdf are absent, _source_companion_key can infer a key from paper IDs like 12spring24, 42summer19, and 33winter11.
The inferred key uses the same format as PDF-derived keys: 9709_<year>_<March|June|November>_<component>.
Existing source-PDF-derived companion behavior remains unchanged.
The live output-integrity audit's missing mark-scheme groups no longer all have source_companion=missing.
test_expectations: Add a fixture with missing source_pdf metadata and paper=42summer19; assert the missing mark-scheme group source_companion is 9709_2019_June_42.
Run the live output-integrity audit with output under iteration-05.
implementation_boundaries: Do not alter question IDs, paper IDs, output JSON, or known missing companion allow-list behavior.
Do not change missing mark-scheme pass/fail logic.
Do not infer companions for unparseable paper IDs; leave those as missing.
repo_hygiene_risk: Low. This is a deterministic audit inference helper and test.
rollback_plan: Remove the paper-ID companion inference helper and the associated test.
done_when: The new paper-inference test fails before implementation and passes after implementation.
The live output-integrity audit still fails on missing mark schemes but reports inferred source companion keys for parseable paper groups.
